privileged_info_for_vlm: Project: 'General Lab Support'. Experiment: 'Buffer Preparation'. Task Name: 'Prepare 10x PBS Stock'. Assigned Ingredients: 'Sodium Chloride (NaCl)', 'Potassium Chloride (KCl)', 'Disodium Phosphate (Na2HPO4)', 'Monopotassium Phosphate (KH2PO4)' from 'Chemical Storage'. Result Text: Must contain 'pH' and '7.4' (expected: 'QC passed: pH adjusted to 7.4'). Output Item: '10x PBS (Batch Mar-26)' in the 'Stock Solutions' inventory.
